scripts.install:all: npm run install:gateway && npm run install:operations && npm run install:mobile
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend/gateway && npm run lint --prefix apps/operations && npm run lint --prefix apps/mobile
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend/gateway && npm run typecheck --prefix apps/operations && npm run typecheck --prefix apps/mobile
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend/gateway && npm run build --prefix apps/operations
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run prisma:validate && npm run build
